testcase.name: runScenario["Search for a product and add it to the cart", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Launching browser...
Scenario: Search for a product and add it to the cart # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:3 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user searches for "14.1-inch Laptop" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSearchesForProduct(java.lang.String) And clicks on the product from the search results # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksOnProduct() And clicks the "Add to Cart" button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksAddToCart(java.lang.String) Then the product should be successfully added to the cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductInCart()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 162355 bytes]
testcase.system-err: Jul 10, 2026 2:44:15 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 150 Jul 10, 2026 2:44:15 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 150.0.7871.47. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Checkout Process with Invalid Data Handling", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](2)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Checkout Process with Invalid Data Handling # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:10 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() And the user has a product inside the shopping cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.addDefaultProductToCart() When the user opens the shopping cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.openShoppingCart() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And selects checkout as guest option # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepGuest() And attempts to continue billing with empty required fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepInvalidBilling() Then a billing validation error message should appear # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepVerifyValidationError() When the user enters valid checkout billing data # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepValidBilling() And completes all remaining checkout steps # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCompleteCheckout() Then the order confirmation message "Your order has been successfully processed!" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepVerifyOrder(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 67254 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["User Registration with Invalid Data Handling", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](3)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: User Registration with Invalid Data Handling # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:22 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the Registration page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToRegistrationForm() And attempts to register with missing required data fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.submitEmptyRegistrationForm() Then a registration form field validation error should appear # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyRegistrationFieldError() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() Then the registration confirmation message "Your registration completed" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyRegistrationSuccessMessage(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 85854 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with Valid & Invalid Credentials", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](4)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Login with Valid & Invalid Credentials # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:30 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm() And attempts to log in with invalid customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginWithInvalidData() Then a login validation error message should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyLoginError() When the user enters the valid credentials of the registered account # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginWithValidData() Then the "My account" email link should be displayed at the top # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyMyAccountHeaderLink(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 138556 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Data Driven Login Validation", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](5)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario Outline: Data Driven Login Validation # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:46 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm() Row_01 Login Status = false And authenticates using credentials ID "Row_01" out of the excel sheet # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.authenticateUsingExcelRowCredentials(java.lang.String) Login Result Recorded Then the login result should be captured # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loginResultCaptured()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 116977 bytes]
Excel Updated Successfully => Row_01 : FAILED Excel Updated : Row_01 -> FAILED

testcase.name: runScenario["Adding Multiple Products to Cart & Validating Cart Summary", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](11)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Adding Multiple Products to Cart & Validating Cart Summary # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:53 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Build your own cheap computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() Then the cart summary totals grid should display correct items and price calculations # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyCartSummaryTotalsGrid()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112192 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Perform Check-out with Coupon Discount Verification", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](12)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Perform Check-out with Coupon Discount Verification # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:60 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to a product details page view and adds an item to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.loadDirectProductDetailsView() And navigates back to the cart page to apply coupon code "test_coupon" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.applyInstructorCouponCode(java.lang.String) Coupon validation processing container status state: false Then the cart summary should reflect the applied discount calculation # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyCartSummaryReflectsCouponDiscount()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 112192 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Logging Out and Verifying Session End", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](13)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Logging Out and Verifying Session End # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:66 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user ensures they are logged in with valid credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureUserIsAuthenticatedForLogoutScenario() Logout link not visible on screen. Clearing session storage and cookies directly via WebDriver API. And clicks the logout button from the account navigation links # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksLogoutButtonFromAccountLinks() Then the user should be logged out and redirected to the home landing page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyUserIsLoggedOutSuccessfully()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 134415 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Forgot Password Password Recovery Process", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](14)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Forgot Password Password Recovery Process # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:72 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the Login page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToLoginForm() And clicks on the "Forgot password?" hyperlink # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userClicksForgotPasswordLink(java.lang.String) And enters the registered account email address to recover password # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterRegisteredEmailForRecovery() And clicks the recovery submission button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickPasswordRecoverySubmission() Then a notification message "Email with instructions has been sent to you." should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyPasswordRecoveryNotification(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 98098 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Update Shopping Cart Quantity Controls and Product Removal", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](15)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Update Shopping Cart Quantity Controls and Product Removal # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:80 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user searches for "14.1-inch Laptop" items inside the store catalogue # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSearchesForProductScenario9(java.lang.String) And clicks on the product link to open the product details page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensProductDetailsPageScenario9() And clicks the "Add to Cart" button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clicksAddToCart(java.lang.String) And navigates to the shopping cart workbench page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartWorkbench() And changes the product quantity field value to "3" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.changeProductQuantity(java.lang.String) And clicks the update action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickUpdateCartButton() Then the cart total should reflect the updated quantity calculations # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyUpdatedQuantityCalculations() When the user checks the remove selection box for the product # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.selectRemoveItemCheckbox() And clicks the update action button again # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickUpdateCartBtnAgain() Then the product should be completely removed and the cart should display "Your Shopping Cart is empty!" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductRemovalAndEmptyCart(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 67459 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Wishlist Operations for Authenticated Users", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](16)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Wishlist Operations for Authenticated Users # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:93 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user logs into their active account if not already authenticated # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureAuthenticatedSessionForWishlist() And searches for "Health Book" and navigates to its product details page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductDetailsForWishlist(java.lang.String) And clicks the Add to Wishlist action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickWishlistBtnOnDetailsPage() And navigates to the Wishlist storage page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToWishlistPortalView() Then the product should be successfully visible inside the wishlist table # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductVisibleInsideWishlistTable() When the user checks the remove checkbox next to the product item # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.performWishlistRemovalSelection() And clicks the Update Wishlist button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.submitUpdateWishlistFormActions() Then the wishlist page should update and display "The wishlist is empty!" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyWishlistIsEmpty(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 56528 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Product Comparison Engine Operations", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](17)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Product Comparison Engine Operations # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:104 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user searches for "Computer" items and opens "Build your own cheap computer" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductForComparison(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And clicks the Add to Comparison List action button # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickComparisonButtonOnDetailsPage() And the user searches for "Computer" items and opens "Simple Computer" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndOpenProductForComparison(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And clicks the Add to Comparison List action button again # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clickComparisonButtonOnSecondDetailsPage() Then the product comparison table grid should display both computer products successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyComparisonGridProducts()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 156967 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Registered User Checkout Process Completion via Gateway Registration", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](18)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Registered User Checkout Process Completion via Gateway Registration # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:112 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user ensures they are signed out to verify the checkout gateway path # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureSignedOutForCheckoutGateway() And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And registers a new user inside the gateway screen and completes the checkout process # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.registerInGatewayAndCompleteCheckout() Then the order confirmation message "Your order has been successfully processed!" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepVerifyOrder(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 72038 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Checkout with New Shipping Address Configuration", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](19)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Checkout with New Shipping Address Configuration # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:121 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And completes billing address confirmation fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.confirmBillingAddressStep() And configures a brand new shipping address location details # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.setupBrandNewShippingAddressDetails() And completes the remaining registered checkout steps # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.completeRemainingCheckoutStepsScenario13And14() Then the registered user order confirmation message "Your order has been successfully processed!" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyOrderConfirmationMessageScenario13And14(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 71341 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Checkout with Different Billing & Shipping Address Setup", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](20)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Checkout with Different Billing & Shipping Address Setup # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:132 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And completes billing address confirmation fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.confirmBillingAddressStep() And selects a completely different separate address for the shipping parameters # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.selectSeparateAddressForShippingParameters() And completes the remaining registered checkout steps # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.completeRemainingCheckoutStepsScenario13And14() Then the registered user order confirmation message "Your order has been successfully processed!" should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyOrderConfirmationMessageScenario13And14(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 71092 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Order History and Invoice Validation after placing order", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](21)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Verify Order History and Invoice Validation after placing order # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:143 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And completes billing address confirmation fields # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.confirmBillingAddressStep() And configures a brand new shipping address location details # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.setupBrandNewShippingAddressDetails() And completes the remaining registered checkout steps # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.completeRemainingCheckoutStepsScenario13And14() And the user logs into their active account if not already authenticated # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.ensureAuthenticatedSessionForWishlist() And the user navigates to My Account page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_user_navigates_to_my_account_page() And opens the Orders history section # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensOrdersHistorySection() Then the recently placed order should be visible in the tracking list # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyRecentlyPlacedOrderIsVisible() When the user clicks on the order details link # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userClicksOnOrderDetailsLink() And selects the PDF invoice option from the dashboard controls # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSelectsPDFInvoiceOption() Then the invoice should be generated successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyInvoiceGenerationSuccess()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 119648 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["My Account Management - Update Personal Details", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](22)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: My Account Management - Update Personal Details # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:162 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user navigates to My Account page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_user_navigates_to_my_account_page() And updates the customer profile information # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.updatesCustomerProfileInformation() And saves the modified profile details # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.savesModifiedProfileDetails() Then the profile information should be updated successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProfileInformationUpdatedSuccessfully()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 102466 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Newsletter Subscription Management", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](23)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Newsletter Subscription Management # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:170 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user navigates to My Account page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_user_navigates_to_my_account_page() And subscribes to the newsletter service # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.subscribesToTheNewsletterService() Then the newsletter subscription should be enabled successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.theNewsletterSubscriptionShouldBeEnabledSuccessfully() When the user unsubscribes from the newsletter service # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_user_unsubscribes_from_the_newsletter_service() Then the newsletter subscription should be disabled successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_newsletter_subscription_should_be_disabled_successfully()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 151944 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Submit Contact Us Form Successfully", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](24)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Submit Contact Us Form Successfully # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:179 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the Contact Us page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userNavigatesToTheContactUsPage() And enters contact name "Alex Tester" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.entersContactName(java.lang.String) And enters contact email "alex.tester@test.com" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.entersContactEmail(java.lang.String) And enters contact enquiry message "Need support regarding product information" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.entersContactEnquiryMessage(java.lang.String) And submits the Contact Us form # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.submitsTheContactUsForm() Then the contact request should be submitted successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyContactRequestSubmittedSuccessfully()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 87977 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Category Navigation Through Categories and Subcategories", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](25)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Category Navigation Through Categories and Subcategories # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:188 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the "Computers" category # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userNavigatesToMainCategory(java.lang.String) And opens the "Desktops" subcategory # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensSpecificSubcategory(java.lang.String) Then products related to the selected subcategory should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifySubcategoryProductsDisplayed() When the user navigates to the "Books" category # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userNavigatesToMainCategory(java.lang.String) Then products related to the selected category should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyCategoryProductsDisplayed()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 237073 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Product Sorting Validation", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](26)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Product Sorting Validation # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:196 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user searches for "Computer" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSearchesForProduct(java.lang.String) And sorts products by "Name: A to Z" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSortsProductsByOption(java.lang.String) Then the products should be sorted correctly by name # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductsSortedAlphabetically() When the user sorts products by "Price: Low to High" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSortsProductsByOption(java.lang.String) Then the products should be sorted correctly by price # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductsSortedByPriceAscending() When the user sorts products by "Price: High to Low" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userSortsProductsByOption(java.lang.String) Then the products should be sorted correctly by price descending # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyProductsSortedByPriceDescending()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 210341 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Product Filter Validation", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](27)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Product Filter Validation # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:206 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user navigates to the "Desktops" category # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userNavigatesToMainCategory(java.lang.String) And applies available product filters # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.applyAvailableProductFilters() Then only products matching the selected filters should be displayed # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyFilteredProductsDisplayed() When the user clears all applied filters # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.clearAppliedFilters() Then all products should be displayed again # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyAllProductsDisplayedAgain()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 144736 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Recently Viewed Products Validation Engine", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](28)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Recently Viewed Products Validation Engine # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:214 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user views the product "14.1-inch Laptop" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userViewsSpecificProduct(java.lang.String) And the user views the product "Health Book" # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userViewsSpecificProduct(java.lang.String) And the user navigates to the Recently Viewed Products page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userNavigatesToRecentlyViewedProductsPage() Then both recently viewed products should be displayed successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyBothRecentlyViewedProductsAreDisplayed()
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 182917 bytes]

testcase.name: runScenario["Product Return Request Submission for Eligible Items", "Product Search and Shopping Cart Management"](29)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Product Return Request Submission for Eligible Items # src/test/resources/features/product_search.feature:221 Given the user is on the Demo Web Shop homepage # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userIsOnHomepage() When the user registers with valid unique customer credentials # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.enterValidRegistrationData() And the user searches for "Computer" items and adds "Simple Computer" to cart # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.searchAndAddMultipleProducts(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) And navigating to the checkout shopping cart page view # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.navigateToCartSummaryView() And checks terms of service and clicks checkout # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.stepCheckout() And completes the registered user checkout process # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.completesTheRegisteredUserCheckoutProcess() And the user navigates to My Account page # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.the_user_navigates_to_my_account_page() And opens the Orders history section # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensOrdersHistorySection() And selects the details of the eligible completed order # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userOpensEligibleOrderDetails() Return Items button is not available for this Demo Web Shop order. And initiates a product return request form submission # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.userInitiatesProductReturnWorkflow() Then the return request summary text "Why are you returning this item?" should be verified successfully # stepdefinitions.ProductSearchSteps.verifyReturnRequestSummaryFeedback(java.lang.String)
Embedding Passed_Step_View [image/png 124864 bytes]
